channel.title: JollyZu Blog
channel.description: Stories about upcycling, slow fashion, and handmade bags from Edinburgh.

item.title: Why Handmade Costs More Than Fast Fashion
item.description: Handmade upcycled bags take hours of skilled work — not minutes on a factory line. A honest look at what you are paying for when you choose slow fashion.
item.author: Zuza

item.title: Why Every JollyZu Bag Has a Previous Life
item.description: Every JollyZu bag starts as rescued fabric — old jeans, rain coats, curtains. Here's why upcycling matters and what a previous life really means.
item.author: Zuza
